package rulecoverage

func PositiveServiceConstructorInstantiatesDependenciesInternally() string {
    ruleID := "service_constructor_instantiates_dependencies_internally"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Constructors that create repositories, clients, or loggers internally instead of accepting them explicitly."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
